creator: eso3@mail.ru
text:
I have 2 Intel Servers.

Next lines are added to /boot/loader.
  
vm.kmem_size_max="1536M"
vm.kmem_size="1536M"

There is zfs.
bizon# zpool status

And there's no problem at all with zfs.

It's work, but with many exeptions of mpt0.

If I made raidz pool, the system hangs up with kernel panic, duping copying files to the pool, with "kmem_map too small" and with the same exeptions of mpt0 around.

And there's no matter how many HDD are in the pool 4, 6, 9 or 10.

How to make raidz with LSILogic SAS/SATA Adapters?
